We propose Story-to-Executable Descriptions (S2ED), a training-free, model-agnostic, prompt-layer framework that converts a full story into a sequence of explicit, editable executable descriptions for more consistent rendering. S2ED coordinates three agents to segment the narrative, ground canonical character attributes, and enrich spatial and affective cues, enabling interpretable prompt-carried state propagation and local edits to repair drift without retraining the generator. Experiments on Flintstones and Shakoo Maku show that S2ED improves sequence-level consistency and character fidelity over strong prompting, large-model planning, and a reference training-based method, under both automatic metrics and human judgments. We also deploy S2ED in an end-to-end story-to-storybook system for children's illustrated stories, with a supplementary video.

</details>


### [259] [KAPPS: A knowledge-based CPPS Architecture for the Circular Factory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22457)
*Etienne Hoffmann,Jan-Felix Klein,Sören Weindel,Max Goebels,Sebastian Behrendt,Daniel Hernández,Ratan Bahadur Thapa,Jürgen Fleischer,Kai Furmans,Steffen Staab*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出KAPPS——一种面向循环制造的基于知识图谱的赛博物理生产系统架构，通过本体驱动的知识图谱与语义接口层实现异构系统间的数据集成、推理与协同，并支持运行时约束执行与人机知识交互。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统线性制造IT架构难以应对循环制造中产品状态多变、过程动态重构及人机知识融合等挑战，亟需能实时表征和管理单个组件唯一性的新架构。

Method: 采用设计科学研究方法，从五个互补视角导出14项需求，并据此设计KAPPS架构：以本体支撑的知识图谱为统一数据主干，结合语义接口层，集成约束执行与事件驱动规划模块。

Result: 实现了两个用例验证：(i) 基于知识图谱服务的异常检测与学习；(ii) 模块化输送系统的运行时约束执行；并通过14项需求评估确认其适用性。

Conclusion: KAPPS将知识图谱从集成层提升为工厂权威写入时态状态源，有效支撑循环制造中不确定性下的动态适应与人机协同。

Abstract: While linear manufacturing relies on homogeneous materials and predefined process sequences, circular manufacturing reintroduces used products with heterogeneous and uncertain conditions. This shift demands manufacturing systems capable of handling variable product states, dynamically reconfigurable processes, and the integration of human and machine knowledge. Conventional manufacturing IT architectures, designed for stable structures and deterministic execution, are unable to meet these requirements, as they cannot adequately represent and manage the uniqueness of individual components at runtime. Following a design science methodology for developing a Cyber Physical Production System for circular manufacturing, we derive 14 requirements from five complementary perspectives. Based on these requirements, we design KAPPS, a knowledge-based architecture that uses an ontology-grounded knowledge graph as a unifying data backbone, combined with a semantic interface layer to enable consistent data and information integration, reasoning, and communication across heterogeneous systems and services, turning the knowledge graph from an integration layer into the factories authoritative write-time state. KAPPS incorporates modules for constraint enforcement and event-driven planning, enabling incremental adaptation of execution plans under uncertainty and human-machine knowledge exchange. The applicability of KAPPS is demonstrated through two implemented use cases: (i) Anomaly detection and learning through knowledge graph mediated services and (ii) runtime constraint enforcement in a modular conveyor system. Subsequently, the architecture is evaluated against the 14 requirements (ed. abstract shortened)

</details>


### [260] [Compiling Agentic Workflows into LLM Weights: Near-Frontier Quality at Two Orders of Magnitude Less Cost](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22502)
*Simon Dennis,Rivaan Patil,Kevin Shabahang,Hao Guo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将代理流程编译进小模型权重的“地下代理”（subterranean agent）方法，以替代当前主流的外部编排框架，实证验证其在多个复杂任务中可克服开发者对微调模型的三大认知障碍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于外部编排器的Agent框架虽流行，但在程序性任务中被证明不如直接将流程写入前沿模型系统提示；但后者存在消耗上下文、依赖前沿模型、泄露私有流程等缺陷。将流程编译进小型微调模型（即‘地下代理’）理论上可解决这些问题，却未被开发者广泛采用，本文旨在探究并消除其采纳障碍。

Method: 识别并实证检验阻碍开发者采用‘地下代理’的三大感知障碍，分别在旅行预订（14节点）、Zoom技术支持（14节点，含产品知识）和保险理赔（55节点，6个决策枢纽）三个真实场景中进行对比实验，评估微调小模型与外部编排框架的性能与实用性。

Result: 在三个复杂任务中，编译流程至小型微调模型（subterranean agent）在效果、成本、隐私和部署灵活性上均展现出竞争力，成功验证并消除了开发者对微调方案的三大主要顾虑。

Conclusion: ‘地下代理’是一种可行且具优势的替代架构；开发者偏好外部编排并非技术不可行，而是源于可解的认知障碍；该工作为Agent架构设计提供了新范式，并推动轻量、私有、高效的Agent落地。

Abstract: Agent orchestration frameworks have proliferated, collectively exceeding 290,000 GitHub stars across LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, Semantic Kernel, Strands, and LlamaIndex. All follow the same pattern: an external orchestrator above the LLM, injecting instructions and routing decisions every turn. Recent work has shown this architecture is dominated for procedural tasks by simply providing the procedure in a frontier model's system prompt [Dennis et al., 2026a], at the cost of consuming the context window, requiring a frontier model for every conversation, and exposing proprietary procedures to third-party providers. Compiling the procedure into the weights of a small fine-tuned model -- creating a subterranean agent -- should resolve all of these concerns, and prior work (SimpleTOD, FireAct, SynTOD, WorkflowLLM, Agent Lumos) has shown the technique works. Yet developer adoption has overwhelmingly favored orchestration. We identify three perceived barriers and address each empirically across travel booking (14 nodes), Zoom support (14 nodes, product-specific knowledge), and insurance claims (55 nodes, 6 decision hubs).

</details>


### [261] [LACO: Adaptive Latent Communication for Collaborative Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22504)
*Tianhao Chen,Yuheng Wu,Dongman Lee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出LACO——一种无需训练的潜在通信范式，用于协同驾驶，通过迭代潜在推理、跨时间步显著性归因和结构化语义知识蒸馏，解决语言通信带来的高延迟与信息损失问题，并在CARLA中验证其低延迟、高性能优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大模型语言推理的协同驾驶方法存在自回归解码导致的高延迟和离散化压缩造成的信息损失；同时作者发现潜在状态直接融合会导致智能体身份混淆。

Method: 提出LACO范式，包含三个核心组件：1）迭代潜在推理（ILD），用于潜在空间中的多步推理；2）跨时间步显著性归因（CHSA），实现高效通信信息选择；3）结构化语义知识蒸馏（SSKD），稳定自车决策。整个方法为训练-free，适配预训练驾驶模型。

Result: 在CARLA闭环实验中，LACO显著降低通信与推理延迟，同时保持强协同驾驶性能。

Conclusion: 潜在通信是协同驾驶中兼顾效率与性能的有效路径；LACO作为一种即插即用、无需微调的方案，为部分可观测多车协同提供了新范式。

Abstract: Collaborative driving aims to improve safety and efficiency by enabling connected vehicles to coordinate under partial observability. Recent approaches have evolved from sharing visual features for perception to exchanging language-based reasoning through foundation models for behavioral coordination. Though communicating in language provides intuitive information, it introduces two challenges: high latency caused by autoregressive decoding and information loss caused by compressing rich internal representations into discrete tokens. To address these challenges, we analyze latent communication in collaborative driving under inherent limitations of multi-agent settings. Our analysis reveals agent identity confusion, where direct fusion of latent states entangles decision representations across vehicles. Motivated by this, we propose LACO, a training-free \textbf{LA}tent \textbf{CO}mmunication paradigm that seamlessly adapts pretrained driving models to collaborative settings. LACO introduces Iterative Latent Deliberation (ILD) for latent reasoning, Cross-Horizon Saliency Attribution (CHSA) for communication-efficient information selection, and Structured Semantic Knowledge Distillation (SSKD) to stabilize ego-centric decision making. Closed-loop experiments in CARLA show that LACO notably reduces communication and inference latency while maintaining strong collaborative driving performance.

</details>


### [262] [Towards Direct Evaluation of Harness Optimizers via Priority Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22505)
*Kai Tzu-iunn Ong,Minseok Kang,Dongwook Choi,Junhee Cho,Seungju Kim,Seungwon Lim,Geunha Jang,Minwoo Oh,Bogyung Jeong,Sunghwan Kim,Taeyoon Kwon,Jinyoung Yeo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为'优先级排序（priority ranking）'的低成本、直接评估harness优化器能力的新方法，通过让优化器对工具等组件按其更新后对性能的影响潜力进行排序，来量化其在每一步的决策质量，并验证该排序能力与实际多步优化效果高度相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅通过目标智能体的最终性能提升来间接评估harness优化器，忽略了其在中间步骤中可能错误的更新动作，导致无法判断优化是否源于有根据的决策还是盲目试错；且缺乏oracle harness使直接评估困难而昂贵。

Method: 提出'优先级排序'设计：要求harness优化器对给定harness中的组件（如工具）按其更新后可能提升或损害性能的潜力进行排序；并构建Shor数据集——包含182个人工验证的跨领域、跨设计、跨阶段优化场景，用于支撑该评估。

Result: 实验证明，优化器在优先级排序任务上的表现与其在真实多步harness优化中的性能显著正相关，验证了该方法作为优化能力可靠预测指标的有效性。

Conclusion: 优先级排序是一种简单、低成本、可扩展的直接评估harness优化器的方法，能有效反映其每步决策质量，并为优化器的设计与改进提供可解释的评估依据。

Abstract: Harness optimization enables automated agent creation by having an optimizer agent iteratively update the harness of target agents. Despite its success, current studies evaluate optimizers solely by observing target agents' performance gains. This indirect end-improvement evaluation neglects optimizers' actions at intermediate steps, which are often erroneous and hinder agent performance. Therefore, it is unclear whether harness optimization is driven by optimizers' informed update actions or simply trial-and-error. This necessitates direct evaluation of harness optimizers. However, evaluating harness optimizers directly is non-trivial and costly due to the lack of oracle harnesses. To address this, we present a simple, low-cost design to directly evaluate them, namely priority ranking. By asking harness optimizers to rank components (e.g., tools) in a given harness by their potential to improve/hinder agent performance when updated, our design quantifies optimizer ability at the step level without expensive rollouts or manual examination. More importantly, optimizers' ranking performance correlates with their ability to improve agents in actual multi-step harness optimization, establishing priority ranking as a reliable predictor of optimization ability. Priority ranking is enabled by Shor, a collection of 182 human-verified optimization scenarios spanning across domains, designs, and time stages. Codes and data can be found at https://github.com/k59118/Harness_Optimizer_Evaluation.

</details>


### [263] [Meta-Learning for Rapid Adaptation in Reference Tracking of Uncertain Nonlinear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22513)
*Jiaqi Yan,Ankush Chakrabarty,Niklas Schmid,John Lygeros,Alisa Rupenyan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于元学习的控制框架，利用源系统离线数据进行元训练，并在目标系统上仅用少量数据进行快速元适应，以解决不确定非线性系统的参考跟踪问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目标系统数据采集困难，需利用结构相似的源系统离线数据提升控制器设计效率与性能。

Method: 将隐式模型无关元学习（iMAML）适配到控制任务中，构建双阶段框架：离线元训练学习共享动力学表征；在线元适应用少量目标数据微调；建模为双层优化问题并给出高效求解方案；支持神经状态空间模型和深度Q网络两种学习算法。

Result: 数值仿真与硬件实验表明该方法控制性能更优，稳定优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提元学习控制框架具有通用性、高效性和强适应性，能有效缓解目标系统数据稀缺下的控制器设计难题。

Abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of reference tracking for uncertain nonlinear systems. Since collecting data from the target system (i.e., the system of interest) is often challenging, our objective is to design optimal controllers using limited target system data. Meta-learning provides a promising paradigm by leveraging offline data from source systems (systems sharing structural similarities with the target system) to accelerate training and enhance control performance. Motivated by this idea, we propose a meta-learning-based control framework that tailors the implicit model-agnostic meta-learning (iMAML) algorithm to the control setting. The framework operates in two phases: an (offline) meta-training phase, where an aggregated representation is learned from source data to capture the shared system dynamics among similar systems, and an (online) meta-adaptation phase, where this representation is fine-tuned on the target system using only a few data samples and limited adaptation steps. We formulate this framework as a bi-level optimization problem and provide an efficient solution with reduced storage complexity and few approximations. The proposed framework is general, allowing various learning algorithms to be integrated. To demonstrate this flexibility, we propose two specific learning algorithms that can be incorporated into our framework based on a neural state-space model and a deep Q-network, respectively. The primary distinction between these approaches is whether explicit system identification is required. Numerical simulations and hardware experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods enhance control performance and consistently outperform baseline approaches.

</details>


### [264] [A Subjective Logic-based method for runtime confidence updates in safety arguments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22530)
*Benjamin Herd,Jessica Kelly,Clarissa Heinemann,João-Vitor Zacchi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种动态定量保障方法，通过结合设计阶段证据与窗口化运行时安全性能指标（SPIs），在主观逻辑（SL）保障案例框架内实现置信度的量化与传播；运行时持续评估SPI证据，并依据规则更新关键声明的置信度——无违规则增信，有违规则快速降信，强调安全响应性而非严格贝叶斯更新；该方法在基于仿真的施工区辅助功能（含ML锥体检测模块）中得到验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态安全案例难以反映系统在真实运行环境中的动态安全性变化，亟需一种能融合运行时证据、实时更新安全置信度的定量保障机制。

Method: 基于主观逻辑（SL）构建统一保障案例框架，将设计时证据与窗口化运行时SPIs联合建模；定义SPI证据评估规则：无违规时渐进提升置信度，出现违规时立即施加显著置信度惩罚；避免复杂贝叶斯后验计算，突出安全关键响应性。

Result: 在施工区辅助功能仿真案例中，成功展示了ML锥体检测组件的运行时置信度随SPI观测结果动态演化的过程，验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

Conclusion: 所提动态定量保障方法可有效桥接静态安全论证与动态运行现实，提升安全论证的时效性与可信度，适用于含机器学习组件的智能安全关键系统。

Abstract: We present a method for dynamic quantitative assurance that enhances static safety cases with continuous, runtime-driven confidence updates. The method quantifies and propagates confidence across the development lifecycle by integrating design-time evidence and windowed runtime Safety Performance Indicators (SPIs) within a single Subjective Logic (SL)-based assurance case. At runtime, SPI evidence is continuously evaluated, and targeted claims are updated using a rule that increases confidence in the absence of violations and imposes prompt penalties when violations occur. This design prioritizes safety-relevant responsiveness over exact classical Bayesian posterior updates. We demonstrate the method using a simulation-based construction zone assist function, focusing on an ML-based construction cone detection component, and show how confidence evolves as SPI evidence is observed in operation.

</details>


### [265] [TerminalWorld: Benchmarking Agents on Real-World Terminal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22535)
*Zhaoyang Chu,Jiarui Hu,Xingyu Jiang,Pengyu Zou,Han Li,Chao Peng,Peter O'Hearn,Earl T. Barr,Mark Harman,Federica Sarro,He Ye*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TerminalWorld 是一个可扩展的数据引擎，能自动从真实终端录屏中反向工程出高保真评估任务，构建了包含1530个验证任务的基准，并揭示当前模型在真实终端工作流上仍表现不佳（最高通过率仅62.5%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有终端智能体评估基准多依赖专家人工设计，难以覆盖真实、动态、多样化的开发者终端行为，缺乏真实性与可扩展性。

Method: 提出 TerminalWorld 数据引擎，自动解析 80,870 条真实终端录屏，提取并验证任务流程，构建涵盖 18 类真实场景、最多超 50 步的 1,530 个任务基准，并人工精选 200 个任务组成 TerminalWorld-Verified 子集用于严格评测。

Result: 在 TerminalWorld-Verified 上评测 8 个前沿模型和 6 个智能体，最高任务通过率仅为 62.5%；与人工构建基准（如 Terminal-Bench）相关性弱（Pearson r=0.20），表明其捕捉了不同维度的真实终端能力。

Conclusion: TerminalWorld 通过自动化构建方式实现了真实性与可扩展性的统一，为终端智能体提供了更贴近开发者实践的动态评估基准，推动该领域向真实世界部署演进。

Abstract: We introduce TerminalWorld, a scalable data engine that automatically reverse-engineers high-fidelity evaluation tasks from "in-the-wild" terminal recordings. Processing 80,870 terminal recordings, the engine yields a full benchmark of 1,530 validated tasks, spanning 18 real-world categories, ranging from short everyday operations to workflows exceeding 50 steps, and covering 1,280 unique commands. From these, we curate a Verified subset of 200 representative, manually reviewed tasks. Comprehensive benchmarking on TerminalWorld-Verified across eight frontier models and six agents reveals that current systems still struggle with authentic terminal workflows, achieving a maximum pass rate of only 62.5%. Moreover, TerminalWorld captures real-world terminal capabilities distinct from existing expert-curated benchmarks (e.g., Terminal-Bench), with only a weak correlation to their scores (Pearson r=0.20). The automated engine makes TerminalWorld authentic and scalable by construction, enabling it to evaluate agents in real-world terminal environments as developer practices evolve. Data and code are available at https://github.com/EuniAI/TerminalWorld.

</details>


### [266] [Think Thrice Before You Speak: Dual knowledge-enhanced Theory-of-Mind Reasoning for Persuasive Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22602)
*Minghui Ma,Bin Guo,Runze Yang,Mengqi Chen,Yan Liu,Jingqi Liu,Yahan Pei,Xuehao Ma,Qiuyun Zhang,Zhiwen Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ToM-PD任务和ToM-BPD数据集，构建基于BDI框架的思维状态建模方法，并设计TTBYS推理框架提升大模型在说服性对话中对信念、欲望及策略的推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大模型因提示策略简单、缺乏心智理论（ToM）知识，难以建模心理状态间的内在依赖，导致表征碎片化与推理不稳定。

Method: 提出基于信念-欲望-意图（BDI）框架的ToM-PD任务；构建大规模细粒度标注数据集ToM-BPD；设计知识增强的分步推理框架TTBYS，融合显式与隐式先验经验。

Result: Qwen3-8B集成TTBYS后，在欲望、信念和说服策略预测上分别超越GPT-5达1.20%、22.80%和16.97%；案例分析显示其提升了推理可解释性与一致性。

Conclusion: 引入ToM建模与结构化推理框架可显著增强大模型在说服性对话中的心智状态理解与策略生成能力。

Abstract: Persuasive dialogue requires reasoning about others' latent mental states, a capability known as Theory of Mind (ToM). However, due to reliance on simple prompting strategies and insufficient ToM knowledge, existing LLMs often fail to capture the intrinsic dependencies among mental states, leading to fragmented representations and unstable reasoning. To address these challenges, we introduce the ToM-based Persuasive Dialogue (ToM-PD) task, grounded in the Belief-Desire-Intention (BDI) framework, which explicitly models the sequential dependencies among mental states in multi-turn dialogues. To facilitate research on this task, we construct a large-scale annotated dataset, ToM-based Broad Persuasive Dialogues (ToM-BPD), capturing fine-grained mental states and corresponding persuasive strategies. We further propose Think Thrice Before You Speak (TTBYS), a knowledge-enhanced stepwise reasoning framework that leverages both explicit and implicit prior experiences to improve LLMs' inference of desires, beliefs, and persuasive strategies. Experimental results demonstrate that Qwen3-8B equipped with TTBYS outperforms GPT-5 by 1.20%, 22.80%, and 16.97% in predicting desires, beliefs, and persuasive strategies, respectively. Case studies further show that our approach enhances interpretability and consistency in reasoning.

</details>


### [267] [Spreadsheet-RL: Advancing Large Language Model Agents on Realistic Spreadsheet Tasks via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22642)
*Banghao Chi,Yining Xie,Mingyuan Wu,Jingcheng Yang,Jize Jiang,Zhaoheng Li,Shengyi Qian,Minjia Zhang,Klara Nahrstedt,Rui Hou,Xiangjun Fan,Hanchao Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Spreadsheet-RL，一种面向真实Excel环境的强化学习微调框架，用于训练专用电子表格AI代理；通过自动构建数据集、设计专用评估基准（Domain-Spreadsheet）和可交互的Spreadsheet Gym环境，显著提升大模型在通用及领域电子表格任务上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于提示工程的电子表格代理难以处理真实世界中复杂的多步操作，亟需更鲁棒、可泛化的专用代理训练方法。

Method: 提出Spreadsheet-RL框架，包括：（1）从在线论坛自动采集起始-目标电子表格对；（2）构建Domain-Spreadsheet领域基准；（3）开发支持多轮交互的Spreadsheet Gym环境（含Python沙箱与精细化工具路由机制）；（4）对Qwen3-4B-Thinking等模型进行RL微调。

Result: 在SpreadsheetBench上Pass@1从12.0%提升至23.4%，在Domain-Spreadsheet上从8.4%提升至17.2%；验证了其在通用与领域任务上的显著增益。

Conclusion: Spreadsheet-RL为构建高能力电子表格AI代理提供了有效范式，推动大模型与日常数据界面（如Excel）的深度、可靠交互，具备强泛化性与实用潜力。

Abstract: Spreadsheet systems (e.g., Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets) play a central role in modern data-centric workflows. As AI agents grow increasingly capable of automating complex tasks, such as controlling computers and generating presentations, building an AI-driven spreadsheet agent has emerged as a promising research direction. Most existing spreadsheet agents rely on specialized prompting over general-purpose LLMs; while this design has potentials on simple spreadsheet operations, it struggles to manage the complex, multi-step workflows typical of real-world applications.
  We introduce Spreadsheet-RL, a reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning framework designed to train specialized spreadsheet agents within a realistic Microsoft Excel environment. Spreadsheet-RL features an automated pipeline for scalable collection of paired start-goal spreadsheets from online forums, as well as domain-specific evaluation tasks in areas such as finance and supply chain management, which we compile into the new Domain-Spreadsheet benchmark dataset. It also includes a Spreadsheet Gym environment designed for multi-turn RL: Spreadsheet Gym exposes extensive Excel functionality through a Python sandbox, along with a refined harness that incorporates a comprehensive tool set and carefully designed tool-routing rules for spreadsheet tasks. Through comprehensive experiments, we show that Spreadsheet-RL substantially enhances AI agent's performance on both general and domain-specific spreadsheet tasks: it improves Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507's Pass@1 on SpreadsheetBench from 12.0% to 23.4%, and raises Pass@1 from 8.4% to 17.2% on our curated Domain-Spreadsheet dataset. These results highlight Spreadsheet-RL's strong potential for generalization and real-world adoption in spreadsheet automation, and broadly, its promise for advancing LLM-based interactions with data interfaces in everyday work.

</details>


### [268] [AtelierEval: Agentic Evaluation of Humans & LLMs as Text-to-Image Prompters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22645)
*Hanjun Luo,Zhimu Huang,Sylvia Chung,Yiran Wang,Yingbin Jin,Jialin Li,Jiang Li,Xinfeng Li,Hanan Salam*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个统一基准AtelierEval，用于量化文本到图像（T2I）系统中上游提示生成组件（人类或MLLM）的提示能力，并设计了技能驱动、记忆增强的评估器AtelierJudge，实现高信度自动化评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有T2I基准仅固定提示并评估模型本身，忽略了上游提示生成环节（人类或MLLM）的能力评估，导致该关键环节缺乏可量化的评测标准。

Method: 提出AtelierEval基准，涵盖360个专家设计任务，基于认知视角划分为三类，支持人与MLLM双接口；设计AtelierJudge评估器，结合主观与客观评分，具备技能建模与记忆增强机制。

Result: AtelierJudge与人类专家Spearman相关性达0.79；在8个MLLM与48名人类用户、4种T2I后端上的实验表明，模仿式提示优于规划式，且图像增强是未来提示器的关键方向。

Conclusion: AtelierEval填补了T2I提示能力评测空白，验证了自动化评估器的有效性，并为提示工程研究提供了新范式与开源资源。

Abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) systems increasingly rely on upstream prompters, either humans or multimodal large language models (MLLMs), to translate user intent into detailed prompts. Yet current benchmarks fix the prompt and only evaluate T2I models, leaving the prompting proficiency of this upstream component entirely unmeasured. We introduce AtelierEval, the first unified benchmark that quantifies prompting proficiency across 360 expert-crafted tasks. Grounded in a cognitive view, it spans three task categories and instantiates tasks using a taxonomy of real-world challenges, with a dual interface for both humans and MLLMs. To enable scalable and reliable evaluation, we propose AtelierJudge, a skill-based, memory-augmented agentic evaluator. It produces subjective and objective scores for prompt-image pairs, achieving a Spearman correlation of 0.79 with human experts, approaching human performance. Extensive experiments benchmark 8 MLLMs against 48 human users across 4 T2I backends, validate AtelierEval as a robust diagnostic tool, and reveal the superiority of mimicry over planning, advocating for an image-augmented direction for future prompters. Our work is released to support future research.

</details>


### [269] [Claw AI Lab: An Autonomous Multi-Agent Research Team](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22662)
*Fan Wu,Cheng Chen,Zhenshan Tan,Taiyu Zhang,Xinzhen Xu,Yanyu Qian,Dingcheng Gao,Lanyun Zhu,Qi Zhu,Yi Tan,Deyi Ji,Guosheng Lin,Tianrun Chen,Deheng Ye,Fayao Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Claw AI Lab 是一个面向实验室的自主研究平台，支持用户通过单条提示词启动可定制角色与协作流程的研究团队，并提供实时监控、成果检查与回滚/恢复功能；其核心组件 Claw-Code Harness 实现本地代码、数据与模型检查点与实验的无缝集成，显著提升实验完整性与结果可靠性；在五项AI研究案例中，该平台在创新性、实验完整性与论文质量上均优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动研究系统多依赖单一智能体或固定串行流程，缺乏交互性、可操控性与可靠性，难以满足真实科研场景需求。

Method: 构建了 Claw AI Lab 平台，包含统一交互式仪表盘、多角色可配置研究团队机制、多种研究模式（探索、多智能体讨论、复现）以及关键组件 Claw-Code Harness，实现本地资源与实验闭环的深度集成。

Result: 在五个AI研究案例的内部评估中，AI专家评审一致认为 Claw AI Lab 在想法新颖性、实验完整性与论文呈现质量上优于 AutoResearchClaw 基线。

Conclusion: Claw AI Lab 代表了一种新型自主科研范式：将自动研究转变为可用、交互式且注重可靠性的科学基础设施。

Abstract: We present Claw AI Lab, a lab-native autonomous research platform that advances automated research from a hidden prompt-to-paper pipeline into an interactive AI laboratory. Rather than centering the system around a single agent or a fixed serial workflow, we allow users to instantiate a full research team from one prompt, with customizable roles, collaborative workflows, real-time monitoring, artifact inspection, and rollback/resume control through a unified dashboard. The platform also supports distinct research modes for exploration, multi-agent discussion, and reproduction, making autonomous research substantially more steerable and laboratory-like in practice. A key practical contribution of Claw AI Lab lies in its Claw-Code Harness, which connects local codebases, datasets, and checkpoints to runnable experiments and feeds execution artifacts back into the research loop. As a result, the harness improves not only execution integration, but also experimental completion and result integrity: experiments are easier to inspect, iterate on, and faithfully transfer into final papers, reducing common failure modes such as partial runs and malformed result reporting. In our internal evaluation on five AI research case studies, using AutoResearchClaw as the baseline, Claw AI Lab is consistently preferred by AI expert judges on idea novelty, experiment completeness, and paper presentation quality. We view Claw AI Lab as an early step toward a new paradigm: autonomous research as usable, interactive, and reliability-aware scientific infrastructure.

</details>


### [270] [WorkstreamBench: Evaluating LLM Agents on End-to-End Spreadsheet Tasks in Finance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22664)
*Thomson Yen,Julian Poeltl,Harshith Srinivas Gear,Yilin Meng,Joshua Fan,Adam Shen,Yili Liu,Ali Bauyrzhan,Siri Du,Haoyang Liu,Daniel Guetta,Hongseok Namkoong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出首个针对LLM代理在端到端电子表格生成任务（尤其是金融建模与情景分析）上的评估基准，构建了涵盖准确性、公式正确性与格式规范性的三维质量评估体系；实验表明当前最强模型（如Claude系列）仍难以稳定生成符合专业金融标准的复杂电子表格。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电子表格基准仅关注问答或单公式编辑，无法评估LLM代理从零生成完整专业电子表格的能力，尤其难以满足金融等企业级场景对可读性、可修改性和多利益相关方协作的实际需求。

Method: 构建面向金融核心工作流（财务建模、预测、情景分析）的端到端电子表格生成评测基准；提出包含Accuracy、Formula、Format三个维度的细粒度评估分类法，反映专业实践标准；结合定量指标与定性人工评审进行综合评估。

Result: Claude系列模型在基准中表现最优，产出最接近专业外观的电子表格；但所有模型在复杂度稍增（如多步链式计算）时性能显著下降，普遍达不到真实金融工作所需的可靠性与专业水准。

Conclusion: 当前LLM代理尚不具备可靠生成高复杂度、专业级电子表格的能力，亟需在推理深度、结构化输出控制和领域知识融合等方面取得突破。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly expected to carry out end-to-end workflows, producing complete artifacts from high-level user instructions. To meet enterprise needs, frontier AI labs have developed agents that can construct entire spreadsheets from scratch. This is especially relevant in finance, where core workflows such as financial modeling, forecasting, and scenario analysis are commonly conducted through spreadsheets. Yet, existing spreadsheet benchmarks do not measure this advanced capability, focusing instead on question-answering or single-formula edits. To address this gap, we provide one of the first evaluations of agents on end-to-end spreadsheet tasks, focusing on economically critical financial workflows such as modeling and scenario analysis. Since deliverables therein are routinely reviewed and revised by multiple stakeholders, judging their quality necessarily involves high-level criteria such as readability or ease of modification. To reflect the multidimensional nature of solution quality, we develop an evaluation taxonomy comprising three dimensions: Accuracy, Formula, and Format, each comprising fine-grained criteria that reflect professional standards. The Claude family leads the benchmark and produces the most professional-looking outputs in our qualitative review, but even the strongest agents frequently fall short of professional finance standards and degrade sharply as the difficulty increases beyond a few chained calculations. This suggests that current agents are not yet able to reliably produce professional-quality spreadsheets at the level of complexity real-world workflows demand.

</details>


### [271] [Is Capability a Liability? More Capable Language Models Make Worse Forecasts When It Matters Most](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22672)
*Nick Merrill,Jaeho Lee,Ezra Karger*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，在具有超线性增长和突变风险的时间序列预测任务（如金融和流行病学）中，大语言模型（LLM）存在“逆向缩放”现象：模型能力越强，分布预测质量反而越差，尤其在分布上尾失准；该现象在新提出的无污染模拟基准FBSim及多个真实世界数据集上均被验证；作者建议预测评估应结合连续型（无界）精度指标与传统二值阈值指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM预测基准多依赖单阈值评价指标，可能掩盖模型在分布尾部（尤其是上尾）的系统性失准问题，而这类问题在金融、流行病等高风险领域至关重要。

Method: 构建无污染的模拟基准ForecastBench-Sim（FBSim），设计具有超线性增长与 regime change 风险的合成SIR流行病时间序列，并设置匹配的线性对照；在FBSim及真实数据（COVID-19、麻疹、房价、恶性通胀）上系统评测多代LLM（含Llama-3.1系列）；采用分位数分解、尾部敏感评分与跨模型族控制实验分析逆向缩放成因。

Result: 确认逆向缩放现象：更强模型在分布预测（尤其上尾）显著变差；该现象独立受模型规模与后训练影响；领域知识无法稳定修复校准；单阈值指标（如MAE、binary accuracy）会错误显示正向缩放，而尾敏感连续指标（如CRPS）揭示真实负相关。

Conclusion: LLM预测能力提升未必带来更可靠的不确定性量化，尤其在长尾风险场景；当前主流评估范式存在严重盲区；必须引入连续、无界、尾敏感的评估指标以保障高风险决策场景下的可信预测。

Abstract: We document inverse scaling in LLMs on forecasting problems whose underlying time series exhibit superlinear growth and tail risk of regime change, a structure common in finance and epidemiology. On these tasks, more capable models produce worse distributional forecasts. The pattern appears on ForecastBench-Sim (FBSim), a contamination-free, simulated-world benchmark we release, in forecasting synthetic SIR epidemics with a matched linear control, and replicates in real-world datasets on COVID-19, measles, housing markets, and hyperinflation. A per-quantile decomposition shows the failure concentrates at the upper tail, which more capable models shift upward to track aggressive extrapolations of growth, while the lower tail stays put. A within-family study of Llama-3.1 shows that both model scale and post-training independently contribute to this effect. Domain knowledge does not reliably rescue calibration. This inverse scaling does not appear on single-threshold metrics common in LLM forecasting benchmarks, reversing the sign of the capability--accuracy relationship on identical outputs. Single-threshold scoring at conventional cutoffs misses the upper-tail cost; tail-inclusive scoring reverses the sign of the capability--accuracy relationship on the same outputs. We recommend that LLM forecasting evaluations use continuous (and unbounded) measures of accuracy alongside bounded binary threshold metrics.

</details>


### [272] [Forecasting Scientific Progress with Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22681)
*Sean Wu,Pan Lu,Yupeng Chen,Jonathan Bragg,Yutaro Yamada,Peter Clark,David Clifton,Philip Torr,James Zou,Junchi Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CUSP基准来评估AI系统预测科学进展的能力，发现当前前沿模型在可行性评估、机制推理、生成性解决方案设计和时间预测等方面存在系统性局限，尤其在生物学、化学和物理学领域表现更差，且模型表现出过度自信和响应偏差，表明其作为科学进展预测工具仍不成熟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究人工智能是否能够预测科学进展，因为尽管AI越来越多地融入科学发现，但其预测能力尚不明确。

Method: 引入基于时间的评估框架，提出多学科、事件级的CUSP基准，涵盖可行性评估、机制推理、生成性解决方案设计和时间预测四个维度，并在4760个科学事件上进行测试。

Result: 当前前沿模型在预测科学进展方面存在系统性、领域依赖性局限；能识别合理研究方向但无法可靠预测进展是否实现及发生时间；AI领域进展时间更可预测，而生物、化学、物理领域较差；性能不受训练截止时间前后影响；额外前置知识仅小幅提升性能，高引用进展差距更大；模型存在过度自信与响应偏差。

Conclusion: 当前AI系统尚不能作为可靠的科学进展预测工具，获取先验知识并不等同于具备可靠预测能力，其性能更多受益于事后信息而非前瞻性预测。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly embedded in scientific discovery, yet whether it can anticipate scientific progress remains unclear. To study this question, we introduce a temporally grounded evaluation framework for forecasting scientific progress under controlled knowledge constraints. We present CUSP (Cutoff-conditioned Unseen Scientific Progress), a multi-disciplinary and event-level benchmark that evaluates scientific forecasting in AI systems through feasibility assessment, mechanistic reasoning, generative solution design, and temporal prediction. Across 4,760 scientific events, we observe systematic and domain-dependent limitations in current frontier models. While models can identify plausible research directions from competing candidates, they fail to reliably predict whether scientific advances will be realized and systematically misestimate when they will occur. Performance is highly heterogeneous across domains, with the timing of AI progress more predictable than advances in biology, chemistry, and physics. Performance is largely insensitive to whether events occur before or after the training cutoff, suggesting these limitations cannot be explained solely by knowledge exposure in training data. Under controlled information access, additional pre-cutoff knowledge improves performance but does not close the gap to full-information settings, which becomes more pronounced for high-citation advances. Models also exhibit systematic overconfidence and strong response biases, indicating unreliable uncertainty estimation. Taken together, current AI systems fall short as predictive tools for scientific progress. Access to prior knowledge does not translate into reliable forecasting, and performance benefits more from post-event information than from forward-looking prediction.

</details>


### [273] [Beyond the Org Chart: AI and the Transformation of Invisible Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22707)
*Stephanie Rosenthal,Shamsi Iqbal*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过访谈24位大型科技公司产品相关人员，探讨AI如何改变正式角色职责、跨角色协作及非正式文化实践（如职业指导），指出AI既带来积极影响（如促进同级协作），也带来挑战（如削弱反馈获取与领导力培养机会），并提出企业与个人应采取的应对措施以维持健康组织文化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解AI驱动公司在工作流程层面的变化，特别是AI对正式角色职责、协作方式以及非正式文化实践（如职业指导）的影响。

Method: 对一家大型科技公司的24位以产品为导向的员工进行半结构化访谈，聚焦AI对其个人工作、团队内协作及职业互动的影响。

Result: 发现AI不仅重塑正式职责与协作，还深刻影响非正式文化实践；部分变化有益（如提升同级协作流畅度），但另一些则威胁常规职业发展路径（如减少专业网络反馈、弱化导师制与领导力展现机会）。

Conclusion: 需通过制度设计使‘隐形工作’显性化，并倡导个体与领导者主动支持同事适应AI转型，以维系支持多元思维、协作与非正式互动的健康企业文化。

Abstract: An increasing number of news and research articles report that AI adoption is allowing professionals to blur and extend the boundaries of their corporate roles. With the goal of understanding how work processes might be changing in an AI-forward company, we interviewed 24 product-focused individuals at a large technology firm about how AI has impacted their own work, their work within their product team, and their professional interactions. Our conversations suggest that AI is not only changing formal role responsibilities and collaborations between those roles, but also changing informal cultural practices like professional mentoring that are key to helping professionals settle in their positions, stay engaged with their work, and grow their careers. Some of these changes are positive, such as smoother collaboration between peers, but other changes are more nuanced and put the typical career growth opportunities, like receiving feedback from professional networks and promoting leadership and mentorship, at risk. We propose steps that AI companies can take to make the invisible work more visible. Additionally, we propose efforts that individuals and leaders can take to support their colleagues through AI transformation while preserving healthy company cultures that support diverse thinking, collaboration, and informal interactions.

</details>


### [274] [AMEL: Accumulated Message Effects on LLM Judgments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22714)
*Sid-ali Temkit*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现大语言模型在连续对话评估中存在累积消息效应（AMEL），即先前对话的情感极性会系统性地影响后续判断，尤其在模型本就不确定的项目上更明显；该效应具有负向偏差不对称性，且不随上下文长度增加而增强；最简单的缓解方法是为每个评估项重置对话上下文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型作为自动化评估器时，先前对话历史的情感极性是否会影响其对后续测试项的判断，即是否存在累积性偏差。

Method: 通过75,898次API调用，覆盖11个来自4家厂商的大模型，在孤立条件与前置正/负情感饱和的历史条件下，对相同测试项进行评估，并量化判断偏移；辅以熵值分析、上下文长度控制、位置扰动及token概率分布检验等机制分析实验。

Result: 发现显著的AME效应（d = -0.17，p < 10^-46）；效应在高不确定性项目中更强（d = -0.34）；无上下文长度依赖；存在显著负向偏差不对称性（负历史诱导偏差是正历史的1.62倍）；模型规模增大可缓解但无法消除该效应；token概率呈连续偏移，位置无关，且含语义与token双重成分。

Conclusion: LLM评估易受对话历史情感极性污染，尤其在模糊判断中；需在实际评估流程中强制重置上下文或平衡历史情感，以保障评估公正性。

Abstract: Large language models are routinely used as automated evaluators: to review code, moderate content, or score outputs, often with many items passing through one conversation. We ask whether the polarity of prior conversation history biases subsequent judgments, an effect we call the accumulated message effect on LLM judgments (AMEL). Across 75,898 API calls to 11 models from 4 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and four open-source models), we present identical test items in isolation or following histories saturated with predominantly positive or negative evaluations.
  Models shift toward the conversation's prevailing polarity (d = -0.17, p < 10^-46). The effect concentrates on items where the model is genuinely uncertain at baseline (d = -0.34 for high-entropy items, vs d = -0.15 when the baseline is deterministic). Bias does not grow with context length: 5 prior turns and 50 produce the same shift (Spearman |r| < 0.01; OLS slope p = 0.80). And there is a negativity asymmetry: paired per item, negative histories induce 1.62x more bias than positive (t = 13.46, p < 10^-39, n = 2,481). Scaling helps but does not solve it (Anthropic: Haiku -0.22 to Opus -0.17; OpenAI: Nano -0.34 to GPT-5.2 -0.17).
  Three follow-ups narrow the mechanism. The token probability distribution shifts continuously, not at a threshold. The negativity asymmetry has both token-level and semantic components, though attributing the balance is exploratory at our sample sizes. Position does not matter: five biased turns anywhere in a 50-turn history produce the same shift. The simplest fix for evaluation pipelines is a fresh context per item; when batching is unavoidable, balancing the history helps.

</details>


### [275] [Parametric Modular Answer Set Programs Made Declarative](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22716)
*Jorge Fandinno,Yuliya Lierler,Torsten Schaub*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种参数化模块化逻辑程序形式化方法，用于增强一阶答案集编程（ASP）的模块性，并支持带集体控制的clingo程序语义建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升一阶答案集编程（ASP）的模块性，以支持更灵活的子程序定义与复用，特别是处理带集体控制的clingo程序结构化需求。

Method: 引入参数化模块化逻辑程序形式化方法，支持带参数的子程序和内省语句，并建立其理论基础，与传统非模块化ASP建立联系。

Result: 该形式化方法能准确刻画带集体控制的clingo程序语义，为模块化ASP提供了坚实的理论基础和实用建模能力。

Conclusion: 参数化模块化逻辑程序是增强ASP模块性与可扩展性的有效途径，弥合了模块化与传统ASP之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: In this paper, we explore the concept of modularity in first-order answer set programming (ASP). We introduce a new formalism called parametric modular logic programs, which allows defining subprograms with parameters and intensionality statements. We demonstrate how this formalism can capture the semantics of clingo-programs with collective control, a feature that enables structuring and instantiating subprograms. We provide theoretical foundations for modular ASP, illustrate its usefulness, and connect to traditional non-modular ASP.

</details>


### [276] [Can AI Make Conflicts Worse? An Alignment Failure in LLM Deployment Across Conflict Contexts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22720)
*Andrii Kryshtal*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出首个针对武装冲突背景下AI模型对齐性（alignment）的评估框架，测试了4家提供商的9种模型在90个多轮冲突场景中的表现，发现其在虚假等价、否认种族灭绝、忽视种族歧视用语等方面存在显著失效（失败率6%-47%），尤其在被要求“平衡叙述”已由国际法庭定责的事件时，5/9模型失败率达80%-100%，凸显模型选择本身即为安全问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI模型已在受武装冲突影响的社会中广泛部署，但尚无成熟实践来评估其输出是否会加剧冲突；亟需专门评估工具以识别其在敏感地缘政治语境下的对齐失效。

Method: 构建包含90个多轮对话场景的评估集，覆盖虚假等价、否认种族灭绝、未识别种族歧视用语等典型冲突相关对齐风险；测试OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek、xAI四家共9种模型配置，并统计其失败率。

Result: 模型失败率差异显著（6%–47%）；当用户刻意要求‘平衡’已由国际法庭明确定责的事件时，5/9模型失败率达80%–100%；首次发布面向冲突语境的AI对齐评估框架。

Conclusion: 模型在冲突语境下的对齐表现差异巨大，模型选择本身构成关键安全决策；应将该评估框架纳入通用AI对齐评估体系，尤其在新闻、人道主义与公共政策等高风险应用场景中强制使用。

Abstract: AI models are already deployed in societies affected by armed conflict, and journalists, humanitarian workers, governments and ordinary citizens rely on them for information or for their work processes. No established practice exists for checking whether their outputs can make those conflicts worse. We tested nine model configurations from four providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, xAI) on 90 multi-turn scenarios designed to surface misaligned behaviour in conflict contexts: false equivalence between documented atrocities, denial of genocide, and failure to recognise ethnic slurs, among others. When such outputs feed into journalism, humanitarian reporting, or public debate, they can deepen divisions in fragile societies. Failure rates span 6\% to 47\% between the best and worst performing models, which makes model choice a safety question in its own right and when users pushed for ``balance'' in cases where international courts have already assigned responsibility, five of nine configurations failed 80 to 100 percent of the time. We release the first evaluation framework for this domain and propose adding it to alignment evaluation portfolios.

</details>


### [277] [Beyond Acoustic Emotion Recognition: Multimodal Pathos Analysis in Political Speech Using LLM-Based and Acoustic Emotion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22732)
*Juergen Dietrich*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了声学情感识别模型能否作为政治演讲分析中Pathos维度的代理，并通过对比声学模型、多模态大语言模型（Gemini）与TRUST多智能体LLM管道的Pathos评分，发现Gemini在Valence维度上与TRUST-Pathos高度相关，而传统声学模型效果不佳；同时指出标准声学情感数据集存在表演性、文化偏差和类别不兼容问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索声学情感识别（SER）模型是否可作为政治演讲中修辞三要素之一Pathos的代理指标，并评估其相对于多模态大语言模型（如Gemini）和TRUST LLM管道的适用性与局限性。

Method: 以德国联邦议院议员Felix Banaszak的一段演讲为案例，对比三种分析方式：(1) emotion2vec_plus_large声学SER模型（经Russell环形投影获得Arousal/Valence）；(2) Gemini 2.5 Flash对音视频+文本的开放上下文多模态分析；(3) TRUST-Pathos三专家LLM监督集成评分；并用Spearman相关性检验及EMO-DB数据集的Gemini开放式标注评估进行验证。

Result: Gemini Valence与TRUST-Pathos显著正相关（rho=+0.664, p<0.001），而emotion2vec Valence无显著相关（rho=+0.097, p=0.499）；EMO-DB评估揭示标准SER语料库存在表演性、文化偏差与类别定义不兼容问题；声学特征仍对低层Arousal估计有效。

Conclusion: 多模态大语言模型（如Gemini）在捕捉语义定义的政治情感（Pathos）方面明显优于纯声学模型；声学模型仅适用于基础唤醒度（Arousal）估计；未来应拓展至融合面部表情与视线的视频分析。

Abstract: We investigate whether acoustic emotion recognition models can serve as proxies for the Pathos dimension in political speech analysis, as operationalised by the TRUST multi-agent large language model (LLM) pipeline. Using a Bundestag plenary speech by Felix Banaszak (51 segments, 245 s) as a case study, we compare three analysis modalities: (1) emotion2vec_plus_large, an acoustic speech emotion recognition (SER) model whose continuous Arousal and Valence values are derived via post-hoc Russell Circumplex projection; (2) Gemini 2.5 Flash, an LLM analysing the full speech audio together with its transcript in an open-ended, context-aware fashion; and (3) TRUST-Pathos scores from a three-advocate LLM supervisor ensemble. Spearman rank correlations reveal that Gemini Valence correlates strongly with TRUST-Pathos (rho = +0.664, p < 0.001), whereas emotion2vec Valence does not (rho = +0.097, p = 0.499). We further demonstrate, via a systematic quality evaluation of the Berlin Database of Emotional Speech (EMO-DB) using Gemini in an open-ended annotation paradigm, that standard SER benchmark corpora suffer from acted speech, cultural bias, and category incompatibility. Our results suggest that LLM-based multimodal analysis captures semantically defined political emotion substantially better than acoustic models alone, while acoustic features remain informative for low-level Arousal estimation. Future work will extend this approach to video-based analysis incorporating facial expression and gaze.

</details>


### [278] [HarnessAPI: A Skill-First Framework for Unified Streaming APIs and MCP Tools](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22733)
*Edwin Jose*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HarnessAPI 是一个 Python 框架，通过将类型化技能文件夹作为唯一真相源，统一 LLM 工具的 HTTP 接口与 MCP 工具注册，自动衍生流式 HTTP 端点、OpenAPI UI 和零配置 MCP 工具，显著减少重复代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决当前 Python LLM 工具需同时维护 HTTP 端点和 MCP 工具注册导致的业务逻辑重复、周边机制（路由、校验、序列化等）冗余及二者随演进而偏离的问题。

Method: 提出 HarnessAPI 框架，以 typed skill folder（含 handler.py 和 Pydantic schema）为单一源；自动构建支持 Server-Sent Events 的流式 HTTP 服务、交互式 OpenAPI UI 和 FastMCP 兼容的 MCP 工具；引入双模内容协商与动态代码生成机制，确保类型注解正确传递至 FastMCP 检查层。

Result: 在六个代表性技能上实测，相比手动维护的 FastAPI + FastMCP 双栈方案，cloc 统计显示框架相关样板代码减少 74%；完全兼容 FastAPI 生态（中间件、依赖注入、部署）。

Conclusion: HarnessAPI 有效消除了 LLM 工具开发中 HTTP 与 MCP 表示的割裂，提升了开发效率与一致性，是面向 Agent 运行时与人类客户端的统一工具抽象实践。

Abstract: Every Python function deployed as an LLM tool must today exist in two forms: an HTTP endpoint for human-facing clients and CI pipelines, and an MCP tool registration for agent runtimes such as Claude and Cursor. These representations share business logic yet diverge in all the surrounding machinery (routing, validation, serialisation, streaming, and schema maintenance), and they drift apart as the underlying code evolves. We present HarnessAPI, a Python framework that eliminates this duplication by treating a typed skill folder as the single source of truth. From one handler.py plus Pydantic schemas, the framework automatically derives a streaming HTTP endpoint with Server-Sent Events, an interactive OpenAPI/Swagger UI, and a zero-configuration MCP tool, all served from a single process. Dual-mode content negotiation lets the same handler serve SSE-streaming and JSON-returning clients with no handler changes. A dynamic code-generation mechanism ensures Pydantic type annotations propagate correctly to FastMCP's inspection layer, resolving a technical limitation that prevents naive closure-based registration. Measured across six representative skills using cloc, HarnessAPI reduces framework-facing boilerplate by 74% compared with a manually maintained dual-stack implementation (FastAPI server + FastMCP server). HarnessAPI subclasses FastAPI, inheriting its full middleware, dependency-injection, and deployment ecosystem. It is available at https://github.com/edwinjosechittilappilly/harnessapi and on PyPI (pip install harnessapi)

</details>


### [279] [Towards a General Intelligence and Interface for Wearable Health Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22759)
*Girish Narayanswamy,Maxwell A. Xu,A. Ali Heydari,Samy Abdel-Ghaffar,Marius Guerard,Kara Vaillancourt,Zhihan Zhang,Jake Garrison,Levi Albuquerque,Dimitris Spathis,Hong Yu,Hamid Palangi,Xuhai "Orson" Xu,David G. T. Barrett,Joseph Breda,Jed McGiffin,Yubin Kim,Yuwei Zhang,Naghmeh Rezaei,Samuel Solomon,Karan Ahuja,Tim Althoff,Jake Sunshine,Ming-Zher Poh,Benjamin Yetton,Ari Winbush,Nicholas B. Allen,James M. Rehg,Isaac Galatzer-Levy,Yun Liu,John Hernandez,Anupam Pathak,Conor Heneghan,Yuzhe Yang,Ahmed A. Metwally,Pushmeet Kohli,Mark Malhotra,Shwetak Patel,Xin Liu,Daniel McDuff*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向可穿戴健康数据的基础模型，利用超过一万亿分钟的无标签传感器信号进行预训练，并通过大规模模型与数据联合扩展，在35项健康预测任务上展现出优异性能；同时结合LLM智能体自动搜索下游预测头，并构建个人健康代理（Personal Health Agent），提升临床相关性、上下文感知与安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可穿戴传感器虽能采集大量行为与生理数据，但将低级信号转化为表征高级健康状态的表示面临个体差异大、基线健康与生活方式多样、高质量标注数据稀缺且标注成本高昂等挑战。

Method: 提出一种可穿戴健康基础模型，基于五百万参与者的超大规模无标签传感器数据（>1万亿分钟）进行预训练；采用模型容量与数据量联合缩放策略；引入LLM智能体‘课堂’自动搜索基于模型嵌入的下游预测头；并构建个人健康代理集成下游预测器以支持临床级响应。

Result: 在35项涵盖心血管、代谢、睡眠、心理健康、生活方式及人口统计因素的任务上系统性提升性能；实现标签高效的小样本学习与稳健的日度指标生成；LLM智能体搜索显著提升下游任务表现，且随LLM容量增大而增强；经1860条临床医生评分验证，个人健康代理响应更具相关性、上下文感知性与安全性。

Conclusion: 大规模无监督预训练结合LLM驱动的下游适配，是构建可泛化、可解释、临床可用的可穿戴健康AI系统的可行路径，为个性化数字健康提供了新范式。

Abstract: While ubiquitous wearable sensors capture a wealth of behavioral and physiological information, effectively transforming these signals into personalized health insights is challenging. Specifically, converting low-level sensor data into representations capable of characterizing higher-level states is difficult due to high phenotypic diversity and variation in individual baseline health, physiology, and lifestyle factors. Moreover, collecting wearable data paired with health outcome annotations is laborious and expensive, and retrospective annotation remains practically unfeasible, contributing to a scarcity of data with high-quality labels. To overcome these limitations, we propose a foundation model for wearable health that is pretrained on more than one trillion minutes of unlabeled sensor signals drawn from a large cohort of five million participants. We demonstrate that the joint scaling of model capacity and pretraining data volume leads to systematic improvements in performance, as evaluated on a diverse set of 35 health prediction tasks, spanning cardiovascular, metabolic, sleep, and mental health, as well as lifestyle choices and demographic factors. We find that this population scale representation unlocks label-efficient few-shot learning and generative capabilities for robust daily metric estimation. To further leverage this learned representation, we deploy a classroom of LLM agents to autonomously search the space of downstream predictive heads built on the model embeddings, showing broad performance improvements that increase with LLM model capacity. Finally, we show how integrating these downstream predictors into a Personal Health Agent can support model responses that are more relevant, contextually aware, and safe, and we validate this via 1,860 ratings from a cohort of clinicians.

</details>


### [280] [Advancing Mathematics Research with AI-Driven Formal Proof Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763)
*George Tsoukalas,Anton Kovsharov,Sergey Shirobokov,Anja Surina,Moritz Firsching,Gergely Bérczi,Francisco J. R. Ruiz,Arun Suggala,Adam Zsolt Wagner,Eric Wieser,Lei Yu,Aja Huang,Miklós Z. Horváth,Andrew Ferrauiolo,Henryk Michalewski,Codrut Grosu,Thomas Hubert,Matej Balog,Pushmeet Kohli,Swarat Chaudhuri*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文评估了利用大语言模型（LLMs）生成形式化证明（如Lean语言）以解决数学开放问题的有效性，首次大规模验证该方法在多个数学领域中的实际应用效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在数学推理方面虽有进展，但其不可靠性限制了其在数学研究中的实用价值；使用LLM生成形式化证明可提升可靠性与可验证性。

Method: 构建基于LLM与Lean交互的智能体，结合LLM生成候选证明与Lean自动验证，并在Erdős问题、OEIS猜想等开放数学问题上进行大规模实证评估。

Result: 最先进智能体以每题数百美元成本自主解决9个Erdős开放问题、44个OEIS猜想；基础版智能体复现了Erdős成果但成本更高；系统已在多个数学子领域实际部署。

Conclusion: AI辅助的形式化证明搜索已展现出解决真实数学开放问题的能力，特定智能体架构（如生成-验证循环）是实现该能力的关键。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly excel at mathematical reasoning, but their unreliability limits their utility in mathematics research. A mitigation is using LLMs to generate formal proofs in languages like Lean. We perform the first large-scale evaluation of this method's ability to solve open problems. Our most capable agent autonomously resolved 9 of 353 open Erdős problems at the per-problem cost of a few hundred dollars, proved 44/492 OEIS conjectures, and is being deployed in combinatorics, optimization, graph theory, algebraic geometry, and quantum optics research. A basic agent alternating LLM-based generation with Lean-based verification replicated the Erdős successes but proved costlier on the hardest problems. These findings demonstrate the power of AI-aided formal proof search and shed light on the agent designs that enable it.

</details>


### [281] [Deep Reinforcement Learning for Flexible Job Shop Scheduling with Random Job Arrivals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22773)
*Yu Tang,Muhammad Zakwan,Efe Balta,John Lygeros,Alisa Rupenyan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于事件的深度强化学习（DRL）方法，使用PPO算法和轻量级MLP解决具有随机作业到达的柔性作业车间调度问题（FJSP），通过学习选择经典派工规则来最小化总完工时间，在异构数据集上优于单个派工规则和触发式MILP方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FJSP面临未来作业不可预测到达和组合复杂性两大挑战，传统混合整数线性规划求解器难以应对。

Method: 采用基于事件的深度强化学习框架，使用近端策略优化（PPO）算法和轻量级多层感知机（MLP），状态表示直接来自环境，动作空间限定为若干经典派工规则。

Result: 在不同异构性和作业到达率的数据集上，该DRL方法均优于任一单独派工规则；相比到达触发的MILP方法，在异构数据集上表现更优。

Conclusion: 基于事件的DRL方法是一种高效、可扩展且适应性强的FJSP求解方案，尤其适用于动态、异构的实际调度场景。

Abstract: The Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (FJSP) is the optimal allocation of a set of jobs to machines. Two primary challenges persist in FJSP: the unpredictable arrival of future jobs and the combinatorial complexity of the problem, rendering it intractable for conventional mixed-integer linear programming solvers. This paper proposes an event-based \gls{DRL} approach to solve FJSP with random job arrivals. Specifically, we employ the Proximal Policy Optimization algorithm and use lightweight Multi-Layer Perceptrons to train the \gls{DRL} agent for minimizing the total completion time of all jobs. We design the state representation to be directly accessible from the environment, and limit the learning agent to selecting from among a set of well-established dispatching rules. Simulations show that our \gls{DRL} approach outperforms any of the individual dispatching rules on datasets with varying heterogeneity and job arrival rates. We benchmark our \gls{DRL} against an arrival-triggered mixed-integer linear programming solution and show that our method achieves good performance especially when the datasets are heterogeneous.

</details>


### [282] [Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22791)
*Ali Hatamizadeh,Yejin Choi,Jan Kautz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Gated DeltaNet-2，通过解耦通道级擦除门和写入门，改进线性注意力机制中的记忆编辑过程，在长上下文任务（如RULER）中显著优于Mamba-2、KDA等基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有线性注意力模型（如KDA、Gated DeltaNet）使用单一标量门控同时控制键侧擦除与值侧写入，限制了记忆编辑的灵活性和精度；需更细粒度、解耦的门控机制以提升长序列建模能力。

Method: 提出Gated DeltaNet-2：引入独立的通道级擦除门b_t和写入门w_t，分离擦除与写入操作；推导出融合通道衰减的块状WY快速权重更新算法，并设计门感知的反向传播以支持高效并行训练。

Result: 在1.3B参数、100B FineWeb-Edu数据上训练后，Gated DeltaNet-2在语言建模、常识推理与检索任务上全面超越Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet、KDA及Mamba-3变体；尤其在RULER长上下文基准中多键检索性能最优。

Conclusion: 解耦擦除与写入门是提升线性注意力模型长程记忆编辑能力的关键设计，Gated DeltaNet-2为高效、可扩展的序列建模提供了新范式。

Abstract: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. The hard part is not just what to forget, but how to edit this compressed memory without scrambling existing associations. Delta-rule models subtract the current read before writing a new value, and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) sharpens forgetting with channel-wise decay. But the active edit still uses a single scalar gate to control two different things: how much old content to erase on the key side and how much new content to commit on the value side. We introduce Gated DeltaNet-2, which generalizes both Gated DeltaNet and KDA by inheriting adaptive forgetting and channel-wise decay while addressing their shared limitation, the scalar tie between erasing and writing. Gated Delta Rule-2 separates these roles with a channel-wise erase gate b_t and a channel-wise write gate w_t, reducing to KDA when both gates collapse to the same scalar and to Gated DeltaNet when the decay also collapses. We derive a fast-weight update view, a chunkwise WY algorithm with channel-wise decay absorbed into asymmetric erase factors, and a gate-aware backward pass that preserves efficient parallel training. At 1.3B parameters trained on 100B FineWeb-Edu tokens, Gated DeltaNet-2 achieves the strongest overall results among Mamba-2, Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Mamba-3 variants across language modeling, commonsense reasoning, and retrieval. Its advantage is most pronounced on long-context RULER needle-in-a-haystack benchmarks, where it improves the evaluated multi-key retrieval setting and remains strong in both recurrent and hybrid settings. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2.

</details>


### [283] [MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22794)
*Qianshu Cai,Yonggang Zhang,Xianzhang Jia,Wei Xue,Jun Song,Xinmei Tian,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MOSS系统，使自主代理系统能在源代码层面进行自我演化，通过自动分析生产环境失败案例、调用外部编码智能体修改代码、在临时环境中验证并安全部署更新，显著提升任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主代理系统部署后静态不变，无法从用户交互中学习；虽有自演化代理出现，但仅限于文本可修改部分，无法解决路由、钩子顺序、状态不变性等代码层结构性故障。

Method: MOSS系统基于生产失败证据自动构建修正批次，通过确定性多阶段流水线驱动源码级自重写：由插件式外部编码智能体执行代码修改，MOSS控制流程与决策；候选版本在临时工作节点上回放验证，经用户确认和健康探测保障后，以容器原地替换方式部署。

Result: 在OpenClaw平台上，MOSS单次演化即令四项任务平均评分从0.25提升至0.61，全程无人工干预。

Conclusion: 源码级自适应是比文本层演化更通用、确定且鲁棒的代理演化范式；MOSS验证了其在真实生产环境中的可行性与有效性。

Abstract: Autonomous agentic systems are largely static after deployment: they do not learn from user interactions, and recurring failures persist until the next human-driven update ships a fix. Self-evolving agents have emerged in response, but all confine evolution to text-mutable artifacts -- skill files, prompt configurations, memory schemas, workflow graphs -- and leave the agent harness untouched. Since routing, hook ordering, state invariants, and dispatch live in code rather than in any text artifact, an entire class of structural failure is physically unreachable from the text layer. We argue that source-level adaptation is a fundamentally more general medium: it is Turing-complete, a strict superset of every text-mutable scope, takes effect deterministically rather than through base-model compliance, and does not erode under long-context drift. We present MOSS, a system that performs self-rewriting at the source level on production agentic substrates. Each evolution is anchored to an automatically curated batch of production-failure evidence and proceeds through a deterministic multi-stage pipeline; code modification is delegated to a pluggable external coding-agent CLI while MOSS retains stage ordering and verdicts. Candidates are verified by replaying the batch against the candidate image in ephemeral trial workers, then promoted via user-consent-gated, in-place container swap with health-probe-gated rollback. On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [284] [Flying Together: Human-Guided Immersive Shared Control for Aerial Robot Teams in Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21680)
*Lou De Bel-Air,Luca Morando,Ruitao Chen,Keru Wang,Benjamin Jarvis,Charbel Toumieh,Yang Zhou,Ken Perlin,Dario Floreano,Giuseppe Loianno*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实（VR）的多无人机共享控制框架，通过用户引导的运动基元规划器与导纳控制器结合，实现在未知受限环境中的实时、人机协同导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主多机器人系统在非结构化环境中难以适应突发状况并捕捉操作员驱动的目标，需增强人机协同能力。

Method: 设计了VR-based共享控制框架，包含用户引导的运动基元规划器（生成连续无碰撞轨迹）和导纳控制器（允许操作员灵活影响编队行为），并实现混合现实（物理+仿真无人机）与双向VR接口。

Result: 实验表明该方法提升了避障能力、维持了智能体间距，并降低了操作员负担。

Conclusion: 沉浸式、人在回路的多机器人导航是可行且具有优势的，尤其适用于未知受限环境下的实时探索任务。

Abstract: While autonomous multi-robots can achieve safe and coordinated navigation, they often struggle to adapt to unforeseen conditions and to capture operator-driven objectives in unstructured environments. We present a Virtual Reality (VR)-based shared control framework for teams of drones operating in constrained and unknown environments, enabling real-time, user-guided exploration. At the core of our approach is a novel, user-guided motion-primitive-based planner that computes continuous, collision-free trajectories while continuously integrating operator input. This planner is coupled with an admittance controller, allowing the operator to flexibly influence team behavior and guide drones toward regions of interest that autonomous planners may overlook. The system supports mixed-reality operations with both physical and simulated drones, and implements a bilateral VR-based interface, allowing the operator to guide the robot team via migration points while receiving immediate visual feedback of the team state. Experimental results show that shared control improves obstacle avoidance, maintains inter-agent spacing, and reduces operator effort, demonstrating the feasibility and advantages of immersive, human-in-the-loop multi-robot navigation.

</details>


### [285] [Distributed Multi-Coverage for Robot Swarms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21686)
*Mariem Guitouni,Aaron T. Becker*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于无人机集群的分布式多覆盖算法，以在局部感知、局部通信、无全局协调的前提下，保证关键资产被多个机器人冗余观测，应对单点故障，提升任务鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主无人机集群在实际部署中面临通信受限、计算能力有限和部分失效等问题，需分布式方案实现可靠多覆盖，而现有最优解依赖集中式整数规划，不满足实际约束。

Method: 设计了一种完全分布式的多覆盖算法，仅依赖局部感知与局部通信，无需全局状态或中央协调，通过本地决策保证各资产按重要性获得所需数量的机器人覆盖。

Result: 算法在理论层面保证收敛性和覆盖率要求，在仿真与实验中验证了其对通信范围限制、机器人失效等现实约束的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该分布式多覆盖算法为实际无人机集群提供了可扩展、容错性强且计算轻量的覆盖策略，填补了集中式最优方法与实际部署需求之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Autonomous drone swarms deployed for surveillance, environmental monitoring, and infrastructure inspection must maintain reliable coverage of critical assets despite robot failures. This requires multicoverage: each asset must be observed by multiple robots for redundancy, with coverage requirements varying by asset importance. While recent work has solved the centralized problem optimally using integer programming, practical deployments face constraints that demand distributed solutions: robots operate with limited communication ranges, onboard computation restricts global planning, and partial system failures must not cause mission abort. We present a distributed multicoverage algorithm for robot swarms operating with local sensing, local communication, and no global coordination.

</details>


### [286] [Closed-Loop Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning for Deformable Microfiber Shape Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21688)
*Alessandro Amici,Houari Bettahar,Veeti Jaakkola,Quan Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种闭环的sim-to-real强化学习方法，用于微纤维在表面的形状控制，通过简化无摩擦仿真训练策略，并依赖实时视觉反馈校正未建模的表面相互作用，在无需重训练或域适应的情况下实现了物理系统的直接部署与高精度控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微尺度下表面和界面相互作用难以精确建模，限制了传统基于模型的控制和sim-to-real学习的应用。

Method: 在简化无摩擦仿真环境中训练几何形状调控的强化学习策略，并在真实系统中利用实时视觉反馈进行闭环迭代校正；策略直接迁移到40 Hz运行的双夹持器微操作系统，不进行再训练或域自适应。

Result: 在24种不同初始构型下，平均点对点形状误差为270±80 μm；在9个不同直径（50/80/120 μm）和长度（10/15/20 mm）的丝纤维样本上，均实现亚毫米级最终形状误差，且无需任何重训练或调参。

Conclusion: 只要任务相关仿真-现实差异在闭环反馈中可观测并可校正，仅在简化仿真中训练的策略即可实现在接触条件下的可重复微纤维形状调控。

Abstract: Autonomous contact-based micromanipulation is challenging because surface and interfacial interactions at the microscale are difficult to model accurately, limiting the use of conventional model-based control and sim-to-real learning. We present a closed-loop sim-to-real reinforcement learning (RL) approach for microfiber shape control on a surface. The central idea is to train geometric shape regulation in a simplified frictionless simulator and rely on real-time visual feedback during deployment to iteratively correct the observed effects of unmodeled surface interactions. An RL policy trained entirely in simulation is transferred directly to a physical dual-gripper micromanipulation system operating at 40 Hz, without retraining or domain adaptation. Using silk microfibers as a testbed, the policy achieves a mean point-wise shape error of 270 $\pm$ 80 $μ$m across twenty-four diverse initial configurations. Across nine specimens covering all combinations of three fiber diameters (50, 80, and 120 $μ$m) and three manipulated lengths (10 mm, 15mm, and 20 mm), the same policy achieves sub-millimeter final shape error without any retraining or retuning. These results show that a policy learned in a simplified simulator can achieve repeatable real-world microfiber shape regulation under surface contact, provided that the task-relevant effects of the sim-to-real mismatch remain observable and correctable within the closed feedback loop.

</details>


### [287] [Motion Design for Grasp-Based Dynamic Locomotion in Microgravity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21704)
*Chaerim Moon,Joohyung Kim,Justin K. Yim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文探讨了微重力环境下多肢机器人基于抓握的动态移动设计，提出了一个可参数化的运动规划框架，并通过物理仿真验证了扩大可行接触力空间和抑制冲击性全身动力学对提升运动性能的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微重力环境下锚点稀疏且不规则，需依赖多肢抓握式移动，而动态移动需在耦合的动力学与运动学约束下协调肢体接触与全身运动。

Method: 提出可参数化的运动规划框架，研究步态模式、步长、速度和基准姿态等设计参数，并在物理仿真中评估两种四足构型的稳定性与驱动需求。

Result: 扩大可行接触力空间和减弱冲击性全身动力学可显著提升运动性能；该结果为微重力下接触配置选择与全身协调提供策略依据。

Conclusion: 抓握式动态移动的设计需兼顾接触力学特性与全身动力学调控，所提框架与发现有助于未来空间机器人的运动系统设计。

Abstract: Locomotion in microgravity often relies on sparsely and irregularly arranged anchors, motivating grasp-based mobility with multiple limbs. In this setting, dynamic locomotion is feasible only through deliberate regulation of both anchored interactions and whole-body coordination under coupled dynamic and kinematic constraints. This paper presents design insights for grasp-based dynamic locomotion with multi-limbed robotic systems in microgravity, targeting scenarios that require 6D limb manipulation to establish contacts with candidate anchors. The investigated design parameters include gait pattern, stride length, locomotion speed, and nominal posture. A parameterizable locomotion planning framework is proposed to support variations of these parameters and to evaluate the resulting locomotion performance in terms of stability and actuation demand. Two representative quadruped morphologies are adopted for evaluation in physics-based simulation. The results demonstrate that enlarging the feasible contact wrench space and attenuating impulsive whole-body dynamics improve locomotion performance. These findings inform strategies for contact configuration selection and whole-body coordination in microgravity locomotion with multi-limbed systems.

</details>


### [288] [PGDG: Physically Grounded Data Generation for Robust Bimanual Policy Learning from a Single Demonstration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21710)
*Cunxi Dai,Haoran Chang,Aditya Nisal,Rahul Kumar,Guofei Chen,Tao Chen,Yuzhe Qin,Guanya Shi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出PGDG框架，通过物理引导的采样与零样本数据筛选，将单个示范扩展为高质量、多样化的恢复行为数据集，显著提升接触密集型双手操作任务的仿真与真实世界性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行为克隆在接触密集型双手操作中面临挑战：多样化示范数据采集成本高，且小扰动易导致系统进入无恢复监督的流形外状态。

Method: PGDG框架结合物理引导的采样器与零样本数据策展器迭代优化：策展器筛选信息丰富、非冗余、可恢复的行为以更新采样分布；采样器据此生成物理合理的成功轨迹；并采用短视距基于采样的控制对高风险状态重标定纠正动作。

Result: 在四个双手操作任务中，PGDG在仿真和零样本真实世界迁移中均显著优于仅空间增强方法；RotateBox-Pitch任务中仿真成功率从38%升至93%，真实世界从35%升至82%；用于GR00T等基础模型微调时，成功率由46%提升至77%。

Conclusion: PGDG提供了一种无需额外人工标注即可生成高质量、多样化、物理可行恢复行为数据的有效范式，显著提升接触密集型双手操作策略的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

Abstract: Behavior cloning for contact-rich bimanual manipulation remains challenging because diverse demonstrations are expensive to collect, and even small disturbances can push the system into off-manifold states where no recovery supervision is available. We propose PGDG, a data generation framework with zero-shot curation that expands a single demonstration into a compact dataset of physically plausible, successful, and diverse recovery behaviors without additional human labeling. PGDG iterates between a physics-grounded sampler and a dataset curator, where the curator selects informative, non-redundant, and recoverable behaviors to update the sampling distribution toward under-covered recovery modes, and the sampler draws physically plausible rollout candidates from this updated distribution and retains successful trajectories. To further improve data quality, PGDG applies short-horizon sampling-based control to relabel selected risky states with corrective actions. Across four bimanual manipulation tasks, PGDG consistently outperforms spatial-only augmentation in both simulation and zero-shot real-world transfer. On RotateBox-Pitch, success improves from 38% to 93% in simulation and from 35% to 82% in the real world. PGDG also enables effective foundation models fine-tuning such as GR00T, increasing success from 46% to 77%. Additional results are available in our website: https://cunxid.github.io/PGDG/.

</details>


### [289] [Mind the Gaps: Multi-Robot Feedback-Driven Ergodic Coverage in Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21719)
*Thales Costa Silva,Nora Ayanian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多机器人自适应覆盖策略，通过在线更新环境参数模型来动态构建目标空间信息分布，改进传统遍历搜索方法，以应对未知先验分布的环境，提升覆盖效率与资源利用率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统遍历搜索方法依赖已知的目标分布，难以应对环境先验分布未知的情况，限制了其在动态、未知环境中的覆盖性能。

Method: 提出一种基于实时环境模型反馈的自适应覆盖策略，将参数化环境模型在线更新，并据此构建动态目标空间信息分布，进而优化机器人遍历轨迹；假设环境静态或变化缓慢于机器人运动。

Result: 仿真验证表明，该方法能有效提升覆盖质量与资源分配效率，使机器人可动态聚焦高信息价值区域。

Conclusion: 所提自适应策略克服了传统遍历方法对先验分布的依赖，增强了多机器人系统在未知环境中的自主覆盖能力与鲁棒性。

Abstract: In this work, we address the problem of multi-robot adaptive coverage, where teams of robots perform dynamic sampling by continuously adjusting their positions to collect data in an environment. This task can be challenging, particularly when robots must be efficiently allocated to new sampling locations over time. Ergodic search methods optimize robot trajectories by ensuring that the robots' time-averaged spatial distribution aligns with the spatial distribution of environmental information. While these methods promote effective exploration provided a target distribution, they often fail to account for unknown prior distributions of the environment. To overcome this limitation, we propose an adaptive coverage strategy that utilizes real-time feedback from an environmental model to adjust robot sampling behavior in response to unknown conditions. Our approach enhances traditional ergodic trajectory optimization by constructing a target spatial information distribution based on parametric models of the environment, which are updated online. This strategy assumes that the environment is either static or changes slowly compared to the robot's motion. Our framework allows robots to dynamically prioritize regions of high interest, improving coverage efficiency, synthesizing effective control policies for individual agents, and optimizing resource use in settings with unknown prior distributions. We validate our approach through simulations, demonstrating its effectiveness in enhancing coverage and resource allocation.

</details>


### [290] [Learning Altruistic Collaboration in Heterogeneous Multi-Team Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21723)
*Riwa Karam,Ruoyu Lin,Brooks A. Butler,Magnus Egerstedt*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于汉密尔顿法则的多团队异构机器人动态分配框架，并利用图神经网络实现集中训练、分散执行的近似最优分配策略，在消防仿真与实验中验证了其可扩展性与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决异构多团队协作中机器人作为可转移资源的动态分配问题，兼顾不同团队能力、转移成本及能力依赖型贡献。

Method: 以生态学中的汉密尔顿法则为 altruistic 决策机制，构建异构多团队协同资源分配框架；针对其NP难特性，设计基于团队交互图的图神经网络策略，支持集中训练与分散执行，预测机器人级转移决策与再分配。

Result: 在消防场景的仿真与真实实验中，所提方法实现近似最优性能，并展现出对大规模系统的良好可扩展性。

Conclusion: 基于汉密尔顿法则的利他式分配范式结合图神经网络，可有效支撑异构多团队在动态环境下的高效协作与资源调度。

Abstract: This paper studies heterogeneous multi-team collaboration through dynamic robot allocation, where robots are treated as transferable resources. Leveraging Hamilton's rule from ecology as an altruistic decision-making mechanism, we propose a multi-team collaborative resource allocation framework with heterogeneous capabilities, transfer costs, and capability-dependent contributions. The resulting allocation problem is combinatorial and is shown to be NP-hard. To address scalability, we develop a graph neural network policy under centralized training and decentralized execution that approximates the altruistic allocations based on Hamilton's rule. The model operates over the team interaction graph and predicts robot-level transfer decisions and next robot-to-team assignments. The proposed approach is validated in a firefighting scenario through simulations and experiments, demonstrating that the learned policy achieves near-optimal performance while scaling to larger systems.

</details>


### [291] [Safe and Steerable Geometric Motion Policies for Robotic Dexterous Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21811)
*Albert Wu,Riccardo Bonalli,Thomas Lew,C. Karen Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出SafePBDS框架，通过拉回控制屏障函数和任务流形动作接口，在异构几何空间中实现机器人灵巧操作的安全、最优运动规划，并在仿真与真实平台（Franka Panda-Allegro手）上验证了其高成功率与灵活性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人灵巧操作需协调定义在不同几何空间（如R^7构型流形、SE(3)末端位姿、R中的避障距离）的目标与约束，现有方法缺乏几何一致性与可证明的安全保障。

Method: 提出Safe Pullback Bundle Dynamical Systems（SafePBDS）：1）构建拉回控制屏障函数，将任务流形上的安全条件转化为构型流形加速度的线性约束；2）设计任务流形动作接口，支持高层策略注入低维残差运动，同时保持安全性；整体基于预定义任务流形动力系统组合生成自主运动。

Result: 在Franka Panda-Allegro 23-DOF平台上验证：灵巧抓取20种家用物体达92.5%成功率（120次试验）；通过一维动作禁用单指实现三指抓取，成功率达94.4%（36次试验）；首次实现基于模型、全驱动的掌心向下在手重定向，支持双向超360°偏航旋转。

Conclusion: SafePBDS提供了几何一致、安全可证、高效灵活的灵巧操作控制框架，兼具自主性与高层可干预性，显著拓展了模型驱动方法在复杂手部操作中的适用边界。

Abstract: Robotic dexterous manipulation requires continuously reconciling objectives and constraints defined on heterogeneous geometric spaces: a robot controlled on a $\mathbb{R}^7$ configuration manifold may need to track end effector poses on $\mathrm{SE}(3)$ while satisfying obstacle avoidance margins in $\mathbb{R}$. We present Safe Pullback Bundle Dynamical Systems (SafePBDS), a geometrically consistent framework that computes optimal, certifiably safe configuration manifold accelerations from objectives and safety requirements on arbitrary task manifolds. SafePBDS builds on prior work that combines predefined task manifold dynamical systems to produce autonomous motion. Its first innovation is a pullback control barrier function construction, which converts task manifold safety conditions into linear constraints on configuration manifold accelerations. The second innovation is a task manifold action interface that allows a high-level policy to inject low dimensional residual motions; zero input recovers the autonomous behavior, while safety is preserved under arbitrary inputs. This lets high-level policies efficiently steer exploration while leaving precise motion to the autonomous behavior. We validate SafePBDS in simulation and on a 23-DOF Franka Panda-Allegro Hand platform. On dexterous grasping, SafePBDS achieves a $92.5\%$ success rate across 20 household objects and 120 trials. Using the action interface, the method can exclude any one of the four fingers during grasping via a one-dimensional action, achieving $94.4\%$ 3-finger grasp success across 3 objects and 36 trials. The efficient planning and safety guarantee of SafePBDS also enables the first model-based, fully actuated palm-down in-hand reorientation, exceeding $360^\circ$ of yaw rotation in both directions under varying object weight and wrist motion. Demo video and details: https://tml.stanford.edu/safe-pbds

</details>


### [292] [Analytical and Experimental Force Analysis of a Soft Linear Pneumatic Actuator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21836)
*Mohammed Abboodi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种线性软套筒执行器（LSSA）的准静态解析模型，综合考虑压力、几何结构、位移、外部负载和轴向刚度耦合作用，实验验证了其力输出随伸长量和负载变化的特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软套筒执行器（SSAs）的力生成行为缺乏充分解释，尤其在伸长过程中输出力变化、外部负载影响及轴向刚度作用方面存在空白。

Method: 建立准静态解析模型，将净轴向力表示为帽端与折叠壁压力贡献减去轴向刚度相关阻力；模型包含内压、投影面积、折叠壁几何、轴向位移及实验拟合的轴向刚度关系；并通过规定伸长和静态加载实验验证模型。

Result: 在125 kPa下，LSSA输出力从0 mm伸长时约112 N降至40 mm时近零；静态负载延迟可测力产生并显著降低力输出，尤其在低中压下；力生成由压力、几何、位移、负载和轴向刚度共同耦合决定。

Conclusion: LSSA的力输出行为高度依赖多物理因素耦合，所提模型能有效描述其非线性力学响应，为软体执行器设计与控制提供理论基础。

Abstract: Soft sleeve actuators (SSAs) have recently been developed as a pneumatic actuation approach for wearable and assistive robotic systems. By integrating the actuation structure into a sleeve-like geometry, these actuators can reduce reliance on external attachment layers and transmission mechanisms while maintaining compliance with limb-shaped surfaces. However, the force-generation behavior of SSAs remains insufficiently explained, particularly with respect to the variation of output force during extension, the influence of external loading, and the mechanical role of axial stiffness. This paper presents an analytical and experimental force analysis of a linear soft sleeve actuator (LSSA). A quasi-static analytical model was developed by expressing the net axial force as the pressure-generated contribution from the cap and folded walls, reduced by the force associated with axial stiffness. The model incorporates internal pressure, projected pressure areas, folded wall geometry, axial displacement, and an experimentally fitted axial stiffness relation. Prescribed-extension and static-load experiments were conducted to evaluate the actuator response. At 125 kPa, the generated force decreased from approximately 112 N at zero extension to nearly zero at 40 mm. Static loading delayed measurable force generation and reduced force output, particularly at low and intermediate pressures. The results show that LSSA force generation is governed by coupled effects of pressure, geometry, displacement, loading, and axial stiffness.

</details>


### [293] [EvoScene-VLA: Evolving Scene Beliefs Inside the Action Decoder for Chunked Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21862)
*Chushan Zhang,Ruihan Lu,Jinguang Tong,Xuesong Li,Yikai Wang,Hongdong Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出EvoScene-VLA，一种引入持久化动作更新场景状态的视觉-语言-动作策略，通过在每个控制周期融合当前观测与上一周期的动作更新先验，提升机器人任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分块式视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略仅依赖当前帧视觉观测，无法建模动作引发的场景动态变化（如接触、遮挡、物体运动），导致几何信息滞后；空间和时序VLA方法分别改进单帧几何或聚合历史帧，但均未维持跨控制块的动作更新场景先验。

Method: 提出EvoScene-VLA：引入循环场景前缀（recurrent scene prefix）作为跨块持久化、几何感知的场景状态；每轮VLM调用中，将当前视觉观测与上一块的动作更新先验融合，动作解码器同时输出动作块和紧凑场景更新；该更新成为下一块的先验，并在新观测到来时被VLM校正；训练时使用Scene Predictor预测未来场景token、Geometric Anchor对齐冻结的深度与3D教师模型，部署时移除二者。

Result: 在31个RoboTwin任务上，固定评估成功率从87.2%提升至89.1%，随机评估从86.1%提升至88.5%；在Galaxea R1-Lite真实机器人上，EvoScene-VLA全面超越所有基线方法。

Conclusion: 维持一个动作更新且视觉校正的持久化场景先验，能更准确反映真实交互中的动态几何演化，显著提升VLA策略在仿真与真实机器人上的泛化性与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Chunked vision-language-action (VLA) policies predict multi-step robot controls, conditioning each update on the current visual observation alone. Yet robot actions cause contact, occlusion, and object motion, and the geometry that later decisions depend on can change before the next visual update arrives. Spatial VLAs improve current-frame geometry. Temporal VLAs aggregate past frames. Neither maintains an action-updated scene prior across chunks. We argue for a persistent action-updated scene state across control calls, and introduce EvoScene-VLA. Its recurrent scene prefix carries a geometry-aware scene state across chunks. At each vision-language model (VLM) call, the VLM combines scene information from the current observation with the action-updated prior from the previous chunk; the action decoder outputs both the next action chunk and a compact scene update. This update becomes the next prior, which the VLM corrects against the new observation when the next call arrives. Each control call therefore starts from a scene prior that reflects both recent actions and fresh visual evidence. During training, \textbf{Scene Predictor} supplies future scene-token targets, and Geometric Anchor aligns scene slots with frozen depth and 3D teachers. We discard both modules at deployment. On 31 RoboTwin tasks, EvoScene-VLA raises average success from 87.2% to 89.1% in fixed evaluation and from 86.1% to 88.5% in randomized evaluation. On the Galaxea R1-Lite real robot, EvoScene-VLA outperforms all baselines.

</details>


### [294] [OCELOT: Odometry and Contact Estimation for Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21863)
*Emre Girgin,Cagri Kilic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种仅依赖本体感知传感器（IMU、关节编码器、力传感器）的腿式机器人里程计方法，核心是融合接触检测与不确定性量化模块，以显式识别和抑制打滑，显著提升了在复杂地形下的里程计精度和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 腿式机器人在仅使用本体感知传感器时难以获得准确的里程计估计，尤其在易打滑环境中缺乏可靠的足端接触状态判断机制。

Method: 基于误差状态扩展卡尔曼滤波（ESEKF）构建完整腿式里程计流程；设计双并行接触检测器：1）基于力传感器的带防抖GMM-FSM确认物理接触，2）基于足端估计速度的运动学GLRT检验静止状态；二者连续置信度分数融合生成接触不确定性信号，用于滤波器状态修正。

Result: 在涵盖多种室内外地形（混凝土、草地、卵石、岩石）共2.4公里的29段真实数据上验证，该方法在纯本体感知条件下显著优于现有同类方法，并具备强打滑鲁棒性；开源了代码与实时ROS2包。

Conclusion: 所提融合接触检测与不确定性量化的ESEKF里程计框架，能有效利用多源本体感知信息，在无外部传感器前提下实现高精度、高鲁棒性的腿式机器人定位，为野外自主导航提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: One of the significant challenges in legged robotics is achieving accurate odometry using only onboard proprioceptive sensors. In this study, we present a complete leg odometry pipeline based on an Error-State EKF (ESEKF) that relies exclusively on proprioceptive data: a body fixed IMU, joint encoders, and force sensors, where filter's state is corrected by feet determined to be in a stationary stance. The core of our contribution is fused contact detection and an uncertainty quantification module designed to explicitly identify and reject slippage. This module runs two detectors in parallel for each foot, 1) a debounced, force-based Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) guided Finite State Machine (FSM) to confirm physical contact, and 2) a kinematic-based Generalized Likelihood Ratio Test (GLRT) on the estimated velocity of the foot. The continuous quality scores from both estimators are fused to detect if the foot is both physically loaded and kinematically stationary and served as an uncertainty signal for each contact.
